name: QA 9000
description:
PCP QA Test No. 9000

If systemd is in the mix, check systemctl status for all PCP

units.



Copyright (c) 2025 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 9000

If systemd is in the mix, check systemctl status for all PCP

units.

Copyright (c) 2025 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 9000.out.bad)
2a3,24
> pmproxy.service: BAD LoadState=loaded UnitFileState=enabled ActiveState=inactive Substate=dead TriggeredBy=missing
> ○ pmproxy.service - Proxy for Performance Metrics Collector Daemon
>      Loaded: loaded (/usr/lib/systemd/system/pmproxy.service; enabled; preset: enabled)
>      Active: inactive (dead) since Wed 2025-12-10 01:50:40 UTC; 5min ago
>    Duration: 11.045s
>        Docs: man:pmproxy(1)
>    Main PID: 1793334 (code=exited, status=0/SUCCESS)
>         CPU: 172ms
> pmproxy_check.timer: BAD LoadState=loaded UnitFileState=static ActiveState=inactive Substate=dead TriggeredBy=missing
> ○ pmproxy_check.timer - Half-hourly optional compression of remote PCP archives from pmproxy
>      Loaded: loaded (/usr/lib/systemd/system/pmproxy_check.timer; static)
>      Active: inactive (dead) since Wed 2025-12-10 01:50:40 UTC; 5min ago
>    Duration: 11.120s
>     Trigger: n/a
>    Triggers: ● pmproxy_check.service
> pmproxy_daily.timer: BAD LoadState=loaded UnitFileState=static ActiveState=inactive Substate=dead TriggeredBy=missing

>      Active: inactive (dead) since Wed 2025-12-10 01:50:40 UTC; 5min ago
>    Duration: 11.120s
>     Trigger: n/a
>    Triggers: ● pmproxy_daily.service
